# AROM STUDIO

> AROM STUDIO is a premium web design and development agency based in India. We build high-performance websites, web applications, SaaS platforms, and digital experiences for startups, growing businesses, and enterprises.

AROM STUDIO was founded by Arnav Pagare. Every project targets Lighthouse 95+ scores and includes 1 Year Support. The agency serves clients across India and globally using Next.js, React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS.

## Services

- [Business Websites](https://aromstudio.vercel.app/services/business-websites): Custom business websites with CMS integration and SEO optimization.
- [E-commerce Websites](https://aromstudio.vercel.app/services/ecommerce): Scalable online stores with payment integration and inventory management.
- [Web Applications](https://aromstudio.vercel.app/services/web-applications): Tailored web applications with full-stack development and cloud deployment.
- [SaaS Platforms](https://aromstudio.vercel.app/services/saas-platforms): Multi-tenant SaaS platforms with subscription billing and scalable infrastructure.
- [UI/UX Design](https://aromstudio.vercel.app/services/ui-ux-design): User-centered design with wireframing, prototyping, and design systems.
- [Website Redesign](https://aromstudio.vercel.app/services/website-redesign): Modern upgrades for existing websites with performance and SEO improvements.
- [SEO Optimization](https://aromstudio.vercel.app/services/seo-optimization): Technical and on-page SEO to improve search rankings and organic traffic.
- [Performance Optimization](https://aromstudio.vercel.app/services/performance-optimization): Speed optimization targeting Lighthouse 95+ scores and Core Web Vitals.
- [AI Integration](https://aromstudio.vercel.app/services/ai-integration): AI-powered features including chatbots, personalization, and smart search.

## Plans

- [Plans Overview](https://aromstudio.vercel.app/pricing): Transparent pricing from starter websites to enterprise solutions.
